remainingIssues.description: executeTaskPipeline() parameter named 'threadId' but body passes it to pipelineResearch/pipelineComplexCode/pipelineSimpleCode which all expect 'channelId'. This is the same class of error as issues 13-14. Parameter should be renamed to 'channelId'.
remainingIssues.impact: Inconsistent naming - may cause confusion during code review, but no runtime error since JS ignores parameter names
